---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or crash
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what happened.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Crash logs**
If applicable, add screenshots. Crash logs can be found at:
Settings > Privacy & Security > Analytics & Improvements > Analytics Data > search "Vibrdrome"

**Device info**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 16 Pro]
- iOS version: [e.g. 18.3]
- Vibrdrome build: [e.g. Build 13]
- Navidrome version: [e.g. 0.53.3]

**Additional context**
Any other details (server setup, network type, etc.)
